sections.paragraph:
Λευί, ὁ (לֵוִי) indecl. (B-D-F §53, 1) and Λευίς, gen. Λευί, acc. Λευίν (B-D-F §55, 1e; W-S. §10, 5; Wuthnow 67; Mlt-H. 146 Λευείς; the mss. and edd. form and sp. fluctuate: Λευΐ-, Λευεί-) Levi (LXX; Test12Patr [Λευί; vv.ll. Λευίς, Λευίν]; JosAs [Λευίς; v.l. Λευί]; EpArist 48; Philo, Joseph.).

① son of Jacob Hb 7:9. οἱ υἱοὶ Λευί vs. 5; φυλὴ Λ. Rv 7:7.

② son of Melchi; in the genealogy of Jesus Lk 3:24.

③ son of Symeon; in the genealogy of Jesus vs. 29.

④ a disciple of Jesus, called by him fr. the tax-collector’s office Lk 5:27, 29. Acc. to Mk 2:14 this disciple was a son of Alphaeus (s. Ἁλφαῖος 1). GPt 14:60 also speaks of a Λευὶς ὁ τοῦ Ἁλφαίου as a disciple of Jesus. GMary 463, 18; 31. On Mt 9:9 s. Μαθθαῖος.

⑤ name of a high priest, partly restored Λευ[είς?] Ox 840, 10.—Pauly-W. XII 2207f; BHHW III 1076. TW.

indecl. indecl. = indeclinable

B-D-F B-D-F = FBlass, ADebrunner, RFunk, A Greek Grammar of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature—List 6

gen. gen. = genitive

acc. acc. = accusative

W-S. W-S. = GWiner, Grammatik des neutestamentlichen Sprachidioms, ed. PSchmiedel—List 6

Wuthnow Wuthnow = HW., Die semitischen Menschennamen—List 6

Mlt-H. Mlt-H. = JMoulton/WHoward, A Grammar of NT Greek II: Accidence and Word-formation—List 6

edd. edd. = editions, editors

  1. sp. = spelling

LXX LXX = Septuaginta, ed. ARahlfs, unless otherwise specified—Lists 2, beg.

Test12Patr Test12Patr = Testaments of the Twelve Patriarchs, with interpolations II b.c.–III a.d.—List 2

vv.ll. vv.ll. = variae lectiones (variant readings)

JosAs JosAs = Joseph and Aseneth—Lists 2, 5

v.l. v.l. = varia lectio (variant reading)

EpArist EpArist = Epistle of Aristeas, II b.c.—List 5

Philo Philo = P. of Alexandria, I b.c.–I a.d.—List 5

Joseph Joseph This abbr. used when no specific texts are cited (s. Jos.); I a.d.—List 5

Λ.̠L. = KLachmann, editor of the Greek NT (1842–50)—List 1, beg.

  1. fr. = from

GPt GPt = Gospel of Peter—List 1

Ox Ox = POxy, but refers to fragments of documents esp. relating to the lexical data base—List 1

Pauly-W Pauly-W = AP./GW., Real-Encyclopädie der klassischen Altertumswissenschaft—List 6

BHHW BHHW = Biblisch-historisches Handwörterbuch—List 6

TW TW = Theologisches Wörterbuch zum NT; tr. GBromiley, Theological Dictionary of the NT—List 6

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 592
